memory_jobs_shape_check.name: memory_jobs_shape_check
memory_jobs_shape_check.value: ("memory_jobs"."kind" = 'extract' and "memory_jobs"."session_id" is not null and "memory_jobs"."source_leaf_id" is not null) or ("memory_jobs"."kind" = 'dream' and "memory_jobs"."session_id" is null and "memory_jobs"."source_leaf_id" is null)
